---
name: Feature or content request
about: Suggest a new checklist item, guide, template, or improvement
title: "[Suggestion] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What's missing?**
Describe the checklist item, guide, template, or feature you think this kit needs.

**Why does it matter?**
What failure mode or recurring problem does this address? (Every checklist item in this kit ships with a "why" — new suggestions should too.)

**Where would it live?**
e.g. a new item under "Testing" in `pr-review-checklist.md`, a new guide under `guides/`, a feature in the interactive checklist.

**Are you willing to open the PR yourself?**
Yes / No / Could pair on it

**Additional context**
Examples from real reviews, links to prior art, or anything else useful.
